title: Rīga City Council members throw hands over water tower
summary_full: A dispute among council members at a meeting of the Rīga City Council Property Committee escalated into a physical altercation on Tuesday, May 12, newswire LETA reports.
summary_public: A dispute among council members at a meeting of the Rīga City Council Property Committee escalated into a physical altercation on Tuesday, May 12, newswire LETA reports.
